name: bs-datetime-picker
title: Bikram Sambat Date Time Picker
description: Combined Bikram Sambat date and time picker with BS to AD conversion helpers.

files.content:
import { getDefaultBsTime, clampBsTime } from '@/lib/bs-time-picker'
import {
  BS_DATETIME_DISPLAY_PATTERN,
  BS_TIME_DISPLAY_PATTERN,
  formatBsDateTimePattern,
  formatBsTimePattern,
} from '@/lib/bs-time-picker/time/pattern'
import {
  clampBsDateTime,
  formatBsDateTime,
  getDefaultBsDateTime,
  mergeBsDateTime,
  splitBsDateTime,
  toAdDate,
} from '@/lib/bs-time-picker/time/datetime'

export {
  BS_DATETIME_DISPLAY_PATTERN,
  BS_TIME_DISPLAY_PATTERN,
  clampBsDateTime,
  formatBsDateTime,
  formatBsDateTimePattern,
  formatBsTimePattern,
  getDefaultBsDateTime,
  mergeBsDateTime,
  splitBsDateTime,
  toAdDate,
  getDefaultBsTime,
  clampBsTime,
}

export * from './types'
export * from './helpers'
export * from './formatters'
export * from './datetime'
export * from './pattern'

docs: Install bs-calendar and bs-date-picker first. Uses `toAdDate()` for API submission.
